title: 1 step DFU - new DFU screen from Settings for both updates
scenario: New DFU screen design in Settings shows simultaneous earbud and charging case updates on Voyager Free 60+ and Voyager Legend 50
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap the Update button on the Home screen.
3. Observe the app navigates to the Settings screen.
4. Verify the SW update tab is displayed with the new DFU screen design.
5. Confirm that all available firmware updates (for both earbud and charging case) are presented for the user to choose from.
6. Repeat steps 1–5 with a Voyager Free 60+ device connected.
7. Repeat steps 1–5 with a Voyager Legend 50 device connected.
expected: The app navigates from Home to the Settings screen with the SW update tab showing the new DFU design. All available updates for the earbud and charging case are listed and selectable by the user.
